title: Sending a Package
scene: 你在邮局寄包裹给国内家人。

turns.en: Hi, domestic or international?
To China. What's the fastest option?

turns.cn: 特快大概五到七天，标准件两周。
turns.en: Express is about five to seven days. Standard is two weeks.

turns.cn: 这个盒子五磅，特快多少钱？
turns.en: This box is five pounds. How much for express?

turns.cn: 六十八美元，要填海关申报单。
turns.en: Sixty-eight dollars. You'll need to fill out a customs form.

turns.cn: 里面是衣服和零食，价值大概五十美元。
turns.en: It's clothes and snacks, worth about fifty dollars.
Okay. Here's your tracking number.

title: Picking Up a Package
scene: 你收到通知去邮局取包裹。

turns.cn: 取件吗？请出示通知单和证件。
turns.en: Picking up a package? Notice slip and ID, please.
Here you go. It's the yellow slip.
Please sign here.

turns.cn: 包裹能再保留几天吗？我周末没空。
turns.en: Can you hold it a few more days? I wasn't free this weekend.

turns.cn: 免费保留十五天，超期会退回。
turns.en: We hold it fifteen days for free. After that it goes back.
Okay, I'll take it today.
Here you go. Careful, it's a bit heavy.

title: Buying Stamps
scene: 你要寄几封信，去邮局买邮票。

turns.cn: 你好，我要寄三封信到美国国内。
turns.en: Hi, I need to mail three letters domestically.
Regular or certified mail?
Regular is fine. How much are stamps?

turns.cn: 一张六十八美分，三张两美元零四。
turns.en: Sixty-eight cents each, two oh four for three.
Where's the mailbox?
The blue one on your left as you exit.
Thank you!

title: Package Delivery at Door
scene: 快递员送货，你在家签收。

turns.cn: 您好，有您的包裹，请签收。
turns.en: Hi, I have a package for you. Please sign here.

turns.cn: 好的，能放门口吗？我在开会。
turns.en: Sure. Can you leave it by the door? I'm in a meeting.

turns.cn: 需要本人签收，麻烦开一下门。
turns.en: It requires a signature. Could you open the door?
One second. You can leave it right here.
Just sign on this line.
Done. Thanks.
Have a great day!

title: Changing Your Address
scene: 你搬家了，去邮局办理地址转递。

turns.cn: 你好，我搬家了，想办理邮件转递。
turns.en: Hi, I moved and need to forward my mail.

turns.cn: 临时转递还是永久改址？
turns.en: Temporary forward or permanent change of address?
Forward for six months first.

turns.cn: 请填这张表，旧地址和新地址。
turns.en: Please fill out this form with your old and new addresses.
When does it take effect?
About seven business days.
Okay. How much is the fee?

title: Sending a Letter
scene: 你在邮局寄一封普通信到美国国内。

turns.cn: 寄到加州，普通邮件多少钱？
turns.en: To California, how much for regular mail?

turns.cn: 标准信封六十八美分，三天到五天。
turns.en: Sixty-eight cents for a standard envelope. Three to five days.
Should I add certified mail?

turns.cn: 重要文件建议加，有签收记录。
turns.en: For important docs, yes. You get delivery confirmation.
Regular is fine. Stamps go here?

turns.cn: 对，右上角，投进外面邮箱也行。
turns.en: Top right. You can drop it in the blue box outside too.
Thanks.

title: International Package Form
scene: 你寄包裹回国，窗口职员指导填海关表。

turns.cn: 内容物要写清楚，中英文都行。
turns.en: List contents clearly. English or Chinese is fine.

turns.cn: 衣服和书，礼物，怎么填价值？
turns.en: Clothes and books, gifts. How do I declare value?
Actual purchase price. Don't understate it.
Air or sea?

turns.cn: 空运两周，海运便宜但两个月。
turns.en: Air is two weeks. Sea is cheaper but two months.
Air please. How much total?
Forty-five. Here's your tracking number.

title: Hold Mail While Away
scene: 你出差两周，办邮件暂存。

turns.cn: 旅行两周，能暂停送信吗？
turns.en: I'm away two weeks. Can you hold my mail?
Yes, up to thirty days, free.
Does delivery resume the day I'm back?
Put your end date. Delivery resumes the next day.

turns.cn: 积压邮件会一次送来吗？
turns.en: Will held mail come all at once?
Yes. The first day might be a lot.
Okay. I'll fill out the form.

title: Priority Mail Options
scene: 你寄重要文件，职员介绍不同速度。

turns.en: Priority one to three days. Express overnight.
Must arrive before Friday. Which should I pick?
Priority mailed today should work. Express costs double.
Should I add signature confirmation?
I'd add it. Three dollars extra.
Okay. Priority with signature.
Twelve fifty total.

title: Package Pickup Failed
scene: 你去邮局取包裹，职员解释为何取不了。

turns.cn: 我来取通知单上的包裹。
turns.en: I'm here to pick up the package on this notice.

turns.cn: 需要带通知单原件和ID，照片不行。
turns.en: Original slip and ID, please. Photos won't work.

turns.cn: 我只有手机照片，怎么办？
turns.en: I only have a photo on my phone. What can I do?

turns.cn: 回家取原件，或让寄件人重发。
turns.en: Go get the slip or have the sender reship.
Will it go back to the sender?
We hold it fifteen days.
I'll bring it tonight.
